---
sec: index
toc: false
page-layout: full
---

{{< include _setup.qmd >}}

```{=html}
<div class="site-hero column-screen">
  <div class="site-logo-word">
    <img src="_img/word-homepage.png" alt="Logo ALISP">
  </div>
  <div class="site-logo-lille">
    <img src="_img/sym-red-nobg.png" alt="Logo ALISP">
  </div>
  <div class="site-logo-alisp-social">
    <div class="site-logo-alisp">
      <img src="_img/logo-homepage.png" alt="Logo ALISP">
    </div>
    <div class="social-icon-links" aria-hidden="true">
      `r social_icon(id = "mail", icon = "envelope", fa = "fa")`
      `r social_icon(id = "insta", icon = "instagram")`
      `r social_icon(id = "twitter", icon = "x-twitter")`
      `r social_icon(id = "facebook", icon = "facebook")`
      `r social_icon(id = "linkedin", icon = "linkedin")`
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

::: {.column-screen}
![](_img/lille_cut.png)
:::

# Page d'accueil

::: callout-caution
# propositions
je réfléchis à mettre ici une sorte de carrousel avec articles "blog" + autres actualités qu'on voudrait mettre en avant
:::

\

::: {.column-screen}
```{=html}
<iframe
  src="https://tinyurl.com/4bzthh8k"
  width="100%"
  height="450">
</iframe>
```
:::
